input_text: Melayu masak rendang kering sikit terus semua orang nak judge. Tapi kalau Cina masak babi tu takde pulak orang komplen. Double standard betul masyarakat kita ni.
reason: Uses food culture to draw ethnic lines and implies double standards along racial divisions. Mild stereotyping of both Malay and Chinese food culture.
suggested_rewrite: Semua masakan ada cara tersendiri. Tak perlu bandingkan atau judge masakan orang lain. Kita patut hargai kepelbagaian makanan Malaysia.

input_text: Jiran India saya tiap kali masak memang satu lorong bau rempah. Tak boleh ke masak biasa sikit? Pening kepala lah setiap hari macam ni.
reason: Complaint about neighbour's cooking singles out Indian ethnicity and frames their food culture as an annoyance, implying their cuisine is abnormal.
suggested_rewrite: Bau masakan jiran saya agak kuat. Mungkin saya boleh berbincang dengan mereka secara baik tentang pengudaraan.

input_text: Saya nak sewa rumah tapi owner cakap prefer Cina je. Apa ni, 2026 dah tapi masih racist ke? Melayu pun bayar sewa tepat masa tau.
reason: Highlights a real discrimination issue but the response generalises with ethnic defensiveness. The complaint itself is valid but the framing creates ethnic friction.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa kerana ditolak sewa rumah berdasarkan kaum. Diskriminasi dalam penyewaan rumah sepatutnya tidak berlaku. Semua penyewa layak dinilai berdasarkan kelayakan mereka.

input_text: Biasalah Cina memang kedekut, mana nak sewa kat Melayu. Takut tak bayar konon. Padahal diorang pun bukan semua bagus.
reason: Applies the 'stingy' stereotype to the entire Chinese community and makes sweeping generalisations about both Chinese landlords and Malay tenants.
suggested_rewrite: Ada sesetengah tuan rumah yang memilih penyewa berdasarkan kaum, dan ini tidak adil. Penyewa harus dinilai berdasarkan rekod pembayaran, bukan latar belakang etnik.

input_text: LRT pagi ni penuh sesak. Yang pelik tu ramai yang tak reti nak beratur. Bukan nak racist tapi memang kaum tertentu yang selalu potong queue.
reason: Uses 'kaum tertentu' as coded language to target a specific ethnic group without naming them. The disclaimer 'bukan nak racist' flags awareness of the problematic nature.
suggested_rewrite: LRT pagi ni penuh sesak. Ramai penumpang yang tidak beratur dengan tertib. Kita semua perlu amalkan budaya beratur untuk keselesaan bersama.

input_text: Tak faham la orang yang pakai tudung tapi perangai macam setan. Baik bukak je tudung tu kalau tak nak ikut ajaran Islam betul-betul.
reason: Polices another person's religious expression by tying hijab-wearing to moral behaviour. Uses harsh language ('setan') to shame individuals.
suggested_rewrite: Kita tak sepatutnya menghakimi orang lain berdasarkan penampilan. Setiap orang ada perjalanan spiritual masing-masing.

input_text: Asyik-asyik JAKIM nak control makanan. Nasi lemak pun nak kena halal cert. Dulu makcik tepi jalan masak semua orang makan je, takde masalah pun.
reason: Dismisses halal certification efforts by trivialising JAKIM's role. While questioning policy is valid, the dismissive tone undermines religious authority functions.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa proses pensijilan halal boleh dipermudah untuk peniaga kecil supaya tidak membebankan mereka, sambil mengekalkan standard keselamatan makanan.

input_text: Sekolah Cina memang bagus akademik, tapi budak-budak dia tak pandai campur dengan kaum lain. Nanti besar pun hidup dalam bubble sendiri je.
reason: Generalises about Chinese school students lacking social integration. While national unity in education is a valid topic, the sweeping claim stereotypes an entire school system.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan kita boleh diperbaiki dari segi integrasi antara kaum. Program pertukaran antara sekolah pelbagai aliran boleh membantu perpaduan.

input_text: Confirm lah economic power semua kat tangan Cina. Melayu kerja kuat pun tak kemana sebab semua network diorang dah control.
reason: Promotes a mild conspiracy theory about Chinese economic control. Frames economic disparity in zero-sum ethnic terms, fostering resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang ekonomi antara komuniti memang wujud dan perlu ditangani. Dasar ekonomi yang inklusif boleh membantu semua rakyat Malaysia bersaing secara adil.

input_text: JAIS masuk restoran nak check Muslim minum arak. Eh, orang lain punya hal lah. Nak jadi polis moral sangat ke? Zaman dah berubah.
reason: Dismisses religious enforcement authority's role with a contemptuous tone. While personal freedom is a valid topic, the dismissive framing undermines institutional function.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penguatkuasaan agama memerlukan keseimbangan antara hak individu dan peraturan agama. Dialog terbuka mengenai pendekatan yang terbaik amat diperlukan.

input_text: Orang Malaysia pergi overseas mesti complaint pasal makanan. 'Tak sedap la, tak macam Malaysia la.' Typical lah kita ni, pergi mana pun nak cari nasi lemak.
reason: Mild national self-stereotyping that reduces Malaysian identity to food obsession. While humorous, it reinforces a reductive view of Malaysians abroad.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai rakyat Malaysia yang menggemari makanan tempatan walaupun berada di luar negara. Ini menunjukkan betapa kayanya budaya makanan kita.

input_text: Budak Melayu sekarang malas nak belajar. Asyik main game je. Tu la, scholarship pun dapat free, tak hargai.
reason: Stereotypes Malay youth as lazy and ungrateful for scholarships. Sweeping generalisation that dismisses individual merit and effort.
suggested_rewrite: Ketagihan permainan video adalah masalah yang melanda remaja dari semua kaum. Program motivasi dan bimbingan boleh membantu pelajar menghargai peluang pendidikan mereka.

input_text: Teacher kat sekolah anak saya tu, Cikgu Siti, memang bias. Budak Melayu dapat markah lebih walaupun jawapan sama. Dah report tapi pihak sekolah cover je.
reason: Accuses a named teacher of ethnic bias in grading without evidence. While bias in education is a valid concern, naming individuals with unverified claims is problematic.
suggested_rewrite: Saya bimbang tentang ketidakadilan dalam pemarkahan di sekolah anak saya. Saya berharap pihak sekolah dapat menyemak semula sistem pemarkahan secara telus.

input_text: Aku bukan racist tapi memang betul la kedai makan Bangla tu tak bersih. Tengok la sendiri. Tangan tak basuh pun pegang makanan.
reason: Uses the 'I'm not racist but' framing to stereotype Bangladeshi-run food stalls as unhygienic. Derogatory shorthand 'Bangla' and hygiene stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan di premis makanan amat penting. Semua kedai makan perlu mematuhi standard kebersihan yang ditetapkan oleh pihak berkuasa kesihatan.

input_text: Dah la parking mahal, then some VIP konon reserve tempat elok-elok. Biasa la, towkay Cina memang rasa diorang own the place.
reason: Associates reserved parking with Chinese business owners and frames it as ethnic entitlement. Mixes class resentment with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Tempat letak kereta yang dikhaskan untuk orang tertentu memang mengecewakan. Pengurusan parking perlu lebih adil untuk semua pengguna.

input_text: Influencer tu buat konten pasal Hari Raya tapi dia bukan Islam pun. Nak clout je tu. Orang lain punya budaya pun nak ambil kesempatan.
reason: Gatekeeps cultural celebration by questioning a non-Muslim influencer's participation in Hari Raya content. Assumes exploitative intent without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Suka tengok orang dari pelbagai latar belakang meraikan budaya Malaysia. Perkongsian budaya membantu perpaduan asalkan dilakukan dengan hormat.

input_text: Cina punya CNY fireworks bising gila sampai pukul 3 pagi. Orang nak tidur tak boleh. Tapi complaint sikit nanti kena panggil racist pulak.
reason: Frames a noise complaint ethnically and positions the complainer as a victim of political correctness. The grievance narrative implies inability to criticise other races.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi mercun pada waktu lewat malam memang mengganggu. Mungkin boleh ada peraturan yang lebih jelas tentang waktu yang dibenarkan untuk mercun semasa perayaan.

input_text: Grab driver tadi complaint pasal gaji kecik. Then tengok profile, foreigner. Eh balik negara sendiri la kalau tak puas hati. Tempat kerja rakyat Malaysia kena ambil.
reason: Tells a foreign worker to go back to their country for expressing work dissatisfaction. Xenophobic sentiment dressed up as economic patriotism.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gaji rendah untuk pemandu e-hailing memang perlu ditangani. Semua pekerja, tanpa mengira latar belakang, berhak mendapat gaji yang adil.

input_text: JAKIM buang duit rakyat je. Berapa ratus juta setahun untuk check makanan halal. Duit tu boleh bagi kat hospital lagi bagus.
reason: Dismisses JAKIM's halal certification function as a waste of public funds. While fiscal scrutiny is valid, the dismissive framing trivialises a function important to the Muslim majority.
suggested_rewrite: Peruntukan belanjawan untuk agensi kerajaan perlu dikaji secara telus. Rakyat berhak tahu bagaimana dana digunakan dan sama ada ia memberi manfaat maksimum.

input_text: Ini influencer Melayu buat content pasal skincare tapi muka pun berjerawat. Nak tipu orang ke? Baik duduk rumah je la.
reason: Attacks an influencer's appearance and credibility with personal insults. The ethnic label is unnecessary and the tone is mean-spirited.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada pengalaman skincare yang berbeza. Kita boleh menilai produk berdasarkan fakta tanpa perlu menyerang penampilan seseorang.

input_text: Tiap kali Deepavali mesti ada jiran complaint bising. Tapi Raya Haji potong lembu depan rumah takde pulak orang tegur. Hipokrit betul.
reason: Uses whataboutism to pit Deepavali and Hari Raya Haji celebrations against each other. Creates inter-religious friction through comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Semua perayaan memerlukan pertimbangan terhadap jiran. Kita patut saling bertoleransi dan berbincang secara baik jika ada sebarang kerisauan.

input_text: Sekolah Tamil memang patut tutup. Apa guna? Budak keluar pun tak boleh cakap BM elok. National school lagi bagus.
reason: Calls for closure of Tamil schools and stereotypes their students as having poor Malay language skills. Dismisses the value of vernacular education.
suggested_rewrite: Penambahbaikan penguasaan Bahasa Melayu di semua aliran sekolah adalah penting. Kita boleh meningkatkan integrasi tanpa menghapuskan kepelbagaian pendidikan.

input_text: Chinese New Year lah, Thaipusam lah, semua cuti. Tapi kalau Maulidur Rasul, orang non-Muslim complaint cuti banyak sangat. Tak adil betul.
reason: Creates a false narrative that non-Muslims complain about Islamic holidays while enjoying their own. Promotes an us-vs-them mentality around public holidays.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia mempunyai banyak cuti umum yang mencerminkan kepelbagaian budaya kita. Ini sepatutnya dilihat sebagai kelebihan yang menyatukan rakyat.

input_text: Budak sekolah agama ni memang narrow minded. Keluar sekolah tak tahu pasal dunia luar. Syllabus pun lapuk.
reason: Stereotypes religious school students as narrow-minded and their curriculum as outdated. Sweeping generalisation about an entire education stream.
suggested_rewrite: Kurikulum sekolah agama boleh diperkemas dengan memasukkan lebih banyak subjek kontemporari supaya pelajar lebih bersedia untuk dunia pekerjaan.

input_text: Orang Melayu gi oversea mesti cari masjid dulu before cari hotel. Priorities betul diorang ni. Jalan-jalan pun tak boleh relax.
reason: Mocks Malay Muslims for prioritising prayer facilities while travelling. Dismissive of religious observance as being incompatible with leisure.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai pelancong Muslim merancang perjalanan dengan mengambil kira kemudahan ibadah. Ini menunjukkan komitmen mereka terhadap agama dan ia patut dihormati.

input_text: Nak masuk condo gym pun kena tengok muka. Security guard tengok saya Melayu, terus tanya resident card. Mat Salleh lalu je tak kena tanya.
reason: Alleges racial profiling by condo security. While such discrimination may occur, the anecdote frames it in ethnic terms that could foster resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Pengawal keselamatan perlu melayan semua penduduk secara sama rata tanpa mengira penampilan atau latar belakang. Polisi yang konsisten penting untuk semua orang.

input_text: Indian colleague asyik cakap Tamil kat office. Orang lain tak faham pun dia tak kisah. Basic courtesy pun takde.
reason: Frames the use of Tamil language in the workplace as rude. While workplace communication norms are valid, singling out a specific language implies linguistic intolerance.
suggested_rewrite: Di tempat kerja, penggunaan bahasa yang semua orang faham membantu komunikasi. Mungkin boleh berbincang tentang norma bahasa di pejabat secara profesional.

input_text: Kalau Cina boleh buka sekolah sendiri, kenapa Melayu tak boleh buat universiti khas Melayu? Oh wait, dah ada UiTM. Tapi tu pun orang complaint. Hipokrit.
reason: Uses whataboutism to defend ethnic-exclusive institutions by comparing them to vernacular schools. Creates a false equivalence that inflames ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan tentang institusi pendidikan perlu dilakukan secara konstruktif. Matlamat kita seharusnya memastikan semua rakyat Malaysia mendapat akses pendidikan berkualiti.

input_text: Makcik kat pasar tu siap cakap 'beli kat sini, jangan beli kat kedai atas tu' sambil tunjuk kedai Bangla. Aku faham sentiment dia tapi agak kasar la.
reason: Relays xenophobic sentiment from a market vendor targeting Bangladeshi-run shops. While acknowledging it's harsh, the narrator partially validates the sentiment with 'aku faham'.
suggested_rewrite: Persaingan perniagaan di pasar adalah normal. Semua peniaga yang beroperasi secara sah mempunyai hak untuk berniaga, tanpa mengira latar belakang mereka.

input_text: Nak beli rumah area Bangsar pun susah. Developer semua target orang kaya Cina. Bumiputera lot sikit je, lokasi pun belakang-belakang.
reason: Frames the housing market as ethnically biased against Bumiputeras. While affordability issues are real, attributing them to ethnic targeting creates division.
suggested_rewrite: Isu mampu milik perumahan memang mencabar. Pemaju perlu memastikan kuota Bumiputera ditempatkan di lokasi yang setara dan harga yang berpatutan untuk semua pembeli.

input_text: Saya nampak trend TikTok Melayu sekarang semua bodoh-bodoh je. Joget tak tentu hala. Budaya kita dah rosak sebab social media ni.
reason: Dismisses Malay TikTok content as stupid and blames social media for cultural decay. Sweeping judgement on youth expression and Malay culture.
suggested_rewrite: Kandungan media sosial memang pelbagai. Kita boleh menyokong kreator yang menghasilkan konten berkualiti dan bermakna untuk masyarakat.

input_text: Dulu kampung ni aman je. Sekarang dah ramai pendatang, mula la kes curi motor, pecah rumah. Coincidence ke?
reason: Implies without evidence that migrants are responsible for increased crime. Uses rhetorical question to suggest correlation between immigration and crime.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kawasan perumahan memerlukan perhatian pihak berkuasa. Program pengawasan kejiranan boleh membantu meningkatkan keselamatan untuk semua penduduk.

input_text: Nasi kandar overrated gila. Orang Penang je yang hype benda ni. Rasa pun biasa je, mahal pulak tu. Orang utara memang pandai marketing.
reason: Dismisses nasi kandar and stereotypes Penang/northern Malaysians as being good at 'marketing' their food. Regional stereotyping through food culture.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap daerah ada makanan kebanggaan masing-masing. Nasi kandar mungkin bukan kesukaan semua orang, tapi ia tetap sebahagian daripada warisan kuliner Malaysia.

input_text: JAWI raid kedai donut sebab tak ada halal cert. Donut je pun. Guna tepung dengan gula, haram ke? Benda macam ni yang buat orang fed up.
reason: Trivialises halal enforcement by dismissing it for simple food items. While the frustration may be common, the dismissive tone undermines religious authority.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pensijilan halal memang penting. Pihak berkuasa boleh membantu peniaga kecil memahami prosedur dan memudahkan proses pendaftaran.

input_text: Owner rumah sewa letak rule 'no cooking curry'. Semua orang tau la tu code untuk apa. Diskriminasi halus macam ni yang menyakitkan.
reason: Highlights coded discrimination in rental rules. The complaint is valid but the interpretation assumes ethnic targeting, which could inflame tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Peraturan sewa rumah sepatutnya munasabah dan tidak menyasarkan sebarang kumpulan etnik secara tidak langsung. Penyewa berhak memasak makanan mereka selagi menjaga kebersihan.

input_text: Every time go mamak sure the roti canai guy flip until so drama. Bro it's just bread lah, not Masterchef. These people ah always want to show off.
reason: Dismisses mamak culinary skill as showing off. The phrase 'these people' carries subtle othering undertones.
suggested_rewrite: The roti canai flipping is always entertaining to watch. It's quite a skill actually!

input_text: MRT packed like sardines and this aunty literally pushed me aside with her bag. Some people really no manners one. Go back to your kampung lah if don't know city etiquette.
reason: The phrase 'go back to your kampung' is dismissive and classist, implying rural people lack manners. Othering based on perceived socioeconomic or cultural background.
suggested_rewrite: MRT was really packed today and I got pushed. It would be great if everyone could be more mindful of personal space during rush hour.

input_text: Indian parents at school meeting always make so much noise. Cannot let teacher finish talking first ah? Every time must argue argue argue.
reason: Stereotypes Indian parents as argumentative and disruptive at school meetings. Generalises behaviour to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Some parents at the school meeting were quite vocal. It would help if everyone could take turns speaking so teachers can share their points.

input_text: These influencers ah, face all filter until cannot recognise. That Malay girl on TikTok especially, without makeup confirm looks like pontianak lah.
reason: Personal attack on an influencer's appearance using supernatural comparison ('pontianak'). Singles out ethnicity unnecessarily while body-shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Many influencers use heavy filters and editing. It would be refreshing to see more authentic content on social media.

input_text: Landlord only want to rent to 'clean tenants'. We all know what that means lah. Code word for no Indians. So frustrating.
reason: Highlights coded discriminatory language in rental market. While the complaint about discrimination is valid, the interpretation assigns ethnic targeting which could inflame tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Some rental listings use vague terms like 'clean tenants' which can be a cover for discrimination. All rental decisions should be based on verifiable tenant history, not ethnicity.

input_text: Why Malay people always double park ah? Go to any taman, confirm got Malay car blocking. Then when you honk, they take their own sweet time.
reason: Attributes inconsiderate parking behaviour to an entire ethnic group. Generalises a common urban problem into an ethnic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking is a real problem in many residential areas. Better enforcement and parking solutions could help everyone.

input_text: I'm Malaysian Chinese living in Australia. People here think we all eat weird stuff like durian and century egg. So embarrassing sometimes tbh.
reason: Expresses embarrassment about Malaysian food culture abroad, internalising stereotypes. Frames traditional foods as 'weird' and something to be ashamed of.
suggested_rewrite: Living abroad, I sometimes get questions about Malaysian food. It's actually a great opportunity to share our unique and diverse cuisine with others.

input_text: Why Chinese school parents so kiasu one? Tuition from standard 1 already. Let kids be kids lah. No wonder their children so stressed.
reason: Uses the 'kiasu' stereotype about Chinese parents and their approach to education. Generalises parenting style to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: There are different approaches to education. Finding a balance between academic achievement and allowing children to enjoy their childhood is important for all families.

input_text: My Malay colleague always takes long lunch breaks during Friday prayers and we have to cover. It's not fair to non-Muslim staff lah.
reason: Frames Friday prayer accommodations as unfair to non-Muslims. While workload distribution is valid, targeting religious practice creates friction.
suggested_rewrite: Workload distribution during Friday prayer times could be better managed. Perhaps the team can work out a fair rotation system.

input_text: Naik bas kat KL ni, sometimes the smell ah... certain people really don't believe in deodorant. Sorry but it's true.
reason: Uses vague 'certain people' to imply a specific ethnic group has hygiene issues on public transport. Coded language for ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Riding public transport during rush hour can be uncomfortable. Better ventilation on buses would help improve the experience for everyone.

input_text: That YouTuber is so cringe. Typical Malaysian Chinese trying to act like ang moh. Speak English also not proper, still want to pretend.
reason: Attacks a Malaysian Chinese YouTuber for perceived inauthenticity, mocking their English and accusing them of mimicking Western culture. Ethnic stereotyping combined with personal insult.
suggested_rewrite: Content creators have different styles. If their content isn't for you, it's fine to just scroll past without making it about their background.

input_text: Bus driver braked so hard I nearly fell. These foreign workers they just give license like that ah? No proper training one.
reason: Assumes the bus driver is a foreign worker and questions their qualifications based on that assumption. Xenophobic generalisation about migrant workers' competence.
suggested_rewrite: The bus braked very suddenly and I nearly fell. Better driver training and safety standards on public buses would benefit all passengers.

input_text: That ustaz on Twitter giving relationship advice lol. Bro you married 3 times, maybe don't be giving advice on marriage yeah?
reason: Mocks a religious figure for giving relationship advice while having multiple marriages. Personal attack that undermines religious authority through ridicule.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship advice should be evaluated based on its merits, regardless of who gives it. Everyone's life experiences can offer different perspectives.

input_text: Malaysian students overseas always stick together and don't mix. Then come back and say 'overseas experience'. What experience? You just went there to eat maggi with other Malaysians.
reason: Mocks Malaysian students abroad for not integrating. While the observation has some validity, the dismissive tone reduces their entire overseas experience to a stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Studying abroad offers great opportunities for cultural exchange. While it's natural to find comfort in familiar company, stepping out of one's comfort zone can enhance the experience.

input_text: Malay food is nice but honestly very unhealthy. All that santan and sugar. No wonder obesity rates so high among them.
reason: Links Malay cuisine to obesity rates in a way that stereotypes both the food culture and the community's health. Reductive health stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian cuisine is rich and flavourful. Like all cuisines, enjoying it in moderation is key. Health awareness is important for all communities.

input_text: Rental advertisement: 'Prefer female Chinese tenant, vegetarian preferred.' Wah so specific. Just say you don't want Malays and Indians lah, don't beat around the bush.
reason: Calls out coded discriminatory rental preferences. While highlighting discrimination, the interpretation explicitly racialises the issue and could escalate tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Rental listings should focus on tenant reliability and lease terms, not personal characteristics. Discriminatory preferences in housing ads need to be addressed through proper channels.

input_text: My Chinese boss always promotes Chinese staff first. Don't care about performance, only care about same race. Office politics is basically racial politics here.
reason: Accuses boss of ethnic favouritism in promotion without evidence. Frames workplace dynamics entirely through an ethnic lens.
suggested_rewrite: Fair promotion practices based on performance and merit are essential in any workplace. If bias is suspected, it should be raised through proper HR channels.

input_text: The ah moi at the counter was so rude. Typical la, Chinese girls working retail think they are better than customers. Smile also cannot.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women in retail as rude and arrogant. Combines ethnic and gender stereotyping in a personal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: I had an unpleasant customer service experience today. Good service should be the standard regardless of the staff member's background.

input_text: I notice all the premium lots in new developments go to Chinese buyers. By the time Bumi lot opens, only leftover units lah. System rigged.
reason: Frames property development allocation as ethnically rigged without evidence. Promotes conspiracy thinking about housing market manipulation.
suggested_rewrite: Fair allocation of housing units in new developments is important. Developers should ensure that all lots, including Bumiputera quotas, offer comparable quality and location.

input_text: Grab driver told me he won't go to certain areas at night because 'you know lah, that area many Indians, not safe'. I was speechless.
reason: Reports a Grab driver's ethnic profiling of Indian-majority areas as unsafe. While the narrator seems disapproving, the statement amplifies the stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: A Grab driver expressed safety concerns about certain areas. Crime is not associated with any ethnic community, and safety measures should be based on data, not stereotypes.

input_text: Friends keep sharing that viral post about how 'certain people' are buying up all the land in Johor. Classic fear mongering but honestly starting to believe also.
reason: Amplifies a conspiracy theory about ethnic land acquisition in Johor. Admits to being influenced by misinformation, normalising conspiracy thinking.
suggested_rewrite: Viral posts about land ownership should be verified with official data before sharing. Property ownership patterns are complex and deserve factual analysis rather than speculation.

input_text: These Indon workers at the construction site always staring at women walking by. So uncomfortable. Management should control them better.
reason: Singles out Indonesian workers for alleged harassment behaviour. Combines xenophobia with gender dynamics to create a negative stereotype of foreign workers.
suggested_rewrite: Harassment in public spaces is unacceptable regardless of who does it. Construction site management should enforce proper conduct standards for all workers.

input_text: Actually I think the problem with Malaysian Indians is they don't help each other. Chinese got clan associations, Malays got MARA. Indians? Nothing. That's why left behind.
reason: Blames the Indian community for their own marginalisation by comparing community support structures. Oversimplifies complex socioeconomic issues into an ethnic character flaw.
suggested_rewrite: Community support structures vary across groups. Strengthening support networks and ensuring equitable access to government assistance can help uplift all communities.

input_text: Indian wedding always until 2am with loud music. Ask them to lower volume, they say 'it's our culture'. Since when disturbing others is culture?
reason: Frames Indian wedding customs as inconsiderate and questions whether cultural practices can justify noise. Generalises all Indian weddings.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night celebrations can be disruptive for neighbours. A respectful conversation about noise levels and local regulations can help find a compromise that respects both the celebration and the community.

input_text: Everytime got flood in KL, always the foreign workers areas that get affected most. Then we all have to help clean up their mess. They should take care of their own drains.
reason: Blames foreign workers for flood damage in their living areas. Ignores systemic infrastructure issues and frames aid as an imposition rather than community solidarity.
suggested_rewrite: Flood-prone areas need better infrastructure and drainage. Local councils should ensure all residential areas, regardless of who lives there, are properly maintained.

input_text: 房东说只租给马来人，华人不要。这种事情到底几时才会改变？每次找房子都是这样，烦死了。
reason: Expresses frustration about ethnic discrimination in housing. While the complaint is legitimate, the emotional venting could escalate into divisive commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 在租房过程中遇到基于种族的筛选，这让我感到失望。希望住房租赁市场能更加公平，以租客的资质来做评估。

input_text: 华人家长每次开家长会就爱炫耀孩子的成绩。拜托，不是每个人都需要知道你孩子考第一名好吗？
reason: Stereotypes Chinese parents as boastful about academic achievement. While academic pressure is a common discussion topic, attributing it ethnically is stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 有些家长在家长会上比较喜欢分享孩子的成绩。如果大家能更多讨论孩子的全面发展就更好了。

input_text: 每次去巫裔开的店，服务态度都很差。慢吞吞的，好像你欠他们钱一样。华人店就不会这样。
reason: Stereotypes Malay-run shops as having poor service while praising Chinese shops, creating an unfair ethnic comparison.
suggested_rewrite: 我遇到过一些服务态度不太好的店铺。不管哪家店，好的服务态度都是值得赞赏的。

input_text: 印度人开的杂货店总是乱七八糟的，东西过期了也不下架。卫生标准真的很堪忧。
reason: Stereotypes Indian-run grocery stores as messy and unhygienic. Generalises individual store issues to an entire ethnic group's businesses.
suggested_rewrite: 我去过一些杂货店发现有过期产品。希望所有商店都能注重卫生标准和产品管理。

input_text: 马来人做生意总是懒散的，开店迟关店早。难怪生意做不好。华人就不会这样。
reason: Stereotypes Malay business owners as lazy and compares them unfavourably to Chinese businesses. Classic work ethic stereotype applied along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: 不同商家有不同的经营时间和方式。成功的生意取决于很多因素，不应该以种族来概括。

input_text: 每次去政府部门办事，马来官员总是态度很差，慢慢来。效率低得让人崩溃。
reason: Stereotypes Malay civil servants as having poor attitudes and being inefficient. Attributes systemic bureaucratic issues to ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的办事效率有待提高。希望能通过数字化改革来改善公共服务体验。

input_text: 华人总是说马来人有特权。那我们华人的商业网络不也是一种特权吗？大家都有各自的优势。
reason: While attempting balance, this frames both ethnic groups in stereotypical terms — Malays as having political privilege and Chinese as having business networks. Reinforces ethnic generalisations.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚社会各群体都有不同的优势和挑战。重要的是建设一个机会平等的社会，让所有人都能发挥潜力。

input_text: 看那些印度人在火车上大声打电话，真的很没教养。公共场合能不能安静一点？
reason: Attributes loud phone behaviour on trains to Indian ethnicity. Generalises inconsiderate behaviour to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: 在公共交通上大声打电话会影响其他乘客。希望大家都能在公共场合保持适当的音量。

input_text: 华人社团总是说要保护华校，但其实他们只是想让孩子不跟其他族群混在一起罢了。
reason: Attributes segregationist motives to Chinese community support for vernacular schools. Questions the sincerity of cultural preservation efforts with a divisive interpretation.
suggested_rewrite: 华校的存在是马来西亚多元教育体系的一部分。如何在保留各族教育传统的同时促进国民团结，是值得探讨的课题。

input_text: 印度人的Thaipusam游行每年都搞到路都不能走。为什么不能在一个固定地点办，非要影响交通？
reason: Frames Thaipusam procession as a traffic inconvenience rather than a significant religious event. Dismissive of Hindu religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: 大型宗教庆典的交通管理确实是个挑战。相关部门可以提前规划替代路线，让庆典和日常交通兼顾。

input_text: 这里的马来餐厅每次开斋月就涨价。趁着节日赚钱，真是没良心。
reason: Accuses Malay restaurants of exploiting Ramadan for profit. Frames a common price complaint in ethnic and religious terms.
suggested_rewrite: 一些餐厅在节日期间调整价格。消费者可以选择性价比高的选项，同时相关部门也应该监督价格合理性。

input_text: 华人过年放鞭炮可以，印度人点蜡烛也可以，为什么马来人放烟火就被投诉？不公平。
reason: Creates a false victimhood narrative by comparing celebration practices across ethnic groups. Uses whataboutism to frame Malay celebrations as unfairly targeted.
suggested_rewrite: 所有节日庆典都应该遵守同样的噪音和安全规定。各族群的庆祝活动应该得到平等的对待和尊重。

input_text: 华人说的'马来人懒'这个刻板印象真的太过分了。但有时候去政府部门办事，真的让人怀疑。
reason: Appears to reject a stereotype but then validates it through personal experience. This ambivalent prejudice is a subtle form of stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 刻板印象对任何群体都是不公平的。政府部门的服务效率是系统性问题，与种族无关。

input_text: 每次租房都被问是不是穆斯林。不是穆斯林就不能住吗？这什么逻辑？
reason: Highlights religious discrimination in rental market. While the complaint is valid, the frustrated tone could escalate into anti-Muslim sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: 租房不应以宗教信仰作为筛选条件。所有租户都应根据信用和行为记录来评估。

input_text: 看这个马来网红每天就是吃吃吃。除了吃还会什么？难怪大家说他们只会享受不会工作。
reason: Attacks a Malay influencer's food content and extends it to stereotype the entire Malay community as only knowing how to enjoy life without working.
suggested_rewrite: 美食内容创作是一种职业选择。每个网红都有自己的专长领域，不应该以此来评判整个群体。

input_text: மலாய் கடைகளில் சாப்பிட்டால் வயிறு வலிக்கும். அவங்க சமையல் முறை சுகாதாரமா இருக்காது.
reason: Stereotypes Malay food stalls as unhygienic and claims eating there causes stomach problems. Unfair generalisation of an entire cuisine.
suggested_rewrite: எந்தக் கடையிலும் சுகாதாரம் முக்கியம். உணவகங்கள் அனைத்தும் சுகாதார விதிகளைப் பின்பற்ற வேண்டும்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் எல்லா வியாபாரத்தையும் கட்டுப்படுத்துகிறார்கள். நமக்கு வாய்ப்பே இல்லை.
reason: Promotes the conspiracy that Chinese control all businesses and leave no opportunities for others. Economic resentment framed in ethnic terms.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார வாய்ப்புகள் அனைவருக்கும் சமமாக கிடைக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்கம் அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் ஆதரவு வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய்க்காரங்க எப்போதும் அரசாங்க வேலையில் preference கிடைக்கும். நாங்க எவ்வளவு கஷ்டப்பட்டாலும் வாய்ப்பு கிடைக்காது.
reason: Expresses resentment about perceived preferential treatment in government employment along ethnic lines. While affirmative action is debatable, the generalisation fosters ethnic division.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க வேலைவாய்ப்புகளில் திறமை அடிப்படையிலான தேர்வு முறை அதிகரிக்க வேண்டும். அனைவருக்கும் நியாயமான வாய்ப்பு கிடைக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் எல்லா நல்ல வேலையும் மலாய் மற்றும் சீனர்களுக்கு போகிறது. இந்தியர்களுக்கு தோட்டத்தில் வேலை மட்டும் தான்.
reason: Expresses resentment about job distribution along ethnic lines. References the historical association of Indians with plantation work in a way that reinforces victimhood narrative.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து சமூகத்தினருக்கும் சமமான வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் கிடைக்க வேண்டும். திறமை மற்றும் தகுதி அடிப்படையில் வேலை கிடைக்கும் சூழலை உருவாக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் இந்தியர்களுக்கு எந்த மரியாதையும் இல்லை. எப்போதும் மூன்றாம் தரமாக நடத்துகிறார்கள்.
reason: Expresses a sweeping victimhood narrative that Indians are always treated as third-class citizens. While marginalisation concerns are valid, the absolute framing fosters resentment.
suggested_rewrite: இந்திய சமூகம் எதிர்கொள்ளும் சவால்கள் பற்றி அதிக கவனம் செலுத்த வேண்டும். அனைத்து சமூகங்களும் சம மரியாதையுடன் நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: கிறிஸ்துமஸ் கொண்டாடுவது நம் கலாச்சாரத்திற்கு எதிரானது என்று சிலர் சொல்கிறார்கள். ஆனால் கொண்டாட்டங்கள் எல்லோருக்கும் உரியது. இந்த குறுகிய மனப்பான்மை வேண்டாம்.
reason: While defending Christmas celebrations, dismisses those with opposing views as narrow-minded. The confrontational framing creates friction.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து பண்டிகைகளையும் மரியாதையுடன் கொண்டாடுவது மலேசியாவின் பன்முகத்தன்மையை வலுப்படுத்தும். வெவ்வேறு கருத்துக்களை புரிந்துகொள்ள முயற்சிப்போம்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் தமிழ் பள்ளிகளுக்கு நிதி ஒதுக்கீடு மிகவும் குறைவு. மலாய் பள்ளிகளுக்கு எல்லாம் கிடைக்கும்.
reason: Claims Tamil schools receive less funding compared to Malay schools. While funding disparities may exist, the direct ethnic comparison fosters resentment.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து பள்ளிகளுக்கும் போதுமான நிதி ஒதுக்கீடு கிடைக்க வேண்டும். கல்வி வளங்கள் சமமாக விநியோகிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த area-ல எல்லா கடையும் சீன கடை. ஒரு இந்திய கடை கூட இல்ல. நம்மளை ஓரங்கட்டுறாங்க.
reason: Frames the commercial landscape in ethnic terms and claims deliberate marginalisation of Indian businesses. Attributes market dynamics to ethnic conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக வாய்ப்புகள் அனைத்து சமூகத்தினருக்கும் சமமாக கிடைக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்கம் சிறு வணிகர்களுக்கு ஆதரவு வழங்கலாம்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் இறைச்சி கடையில் பன்றி இறைச்சியை வெளிப்படையாக வைக்கிறார்கள். முஸ்லிம்களின் உணர்வுகளை கொஞ்சமும் மதிப்பதில்லை.
reason: Accuses Chinese butcher shops of being insensitive to Muslim feelings by openly displaying pork. Generalises to all Chinese rather than individual shops.
suggested_rewrite: உணவு விற்பனையில் பல்வேறு சமூகங்களின் உணர்வுகளை கருத்தில் கொள்வது நல்லது. தெளிவான குறிப்புகள் மற்றும் பிரிவுகள் அனைவருக்கும் உதவும்.

input_text: எந்த political party-யும் இந்தியர்களை பற்றி கவலைப்படுவதில்லை. வோட்டு நேரத்தில் மட்டும் தான் நினைவுக்கு வருவோம்.
reason: Promotes political cynicism and victimhood narrative about Indian community representation. While political marginalisation concerns are valid, the absolute framing fosters disillusionment.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல் பிரதிநிதித்துவம் அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் முக்கியம். வாக்காளர்கள் தொடர்ந்து தங்கள் பிரதிநிதிகளிடம் பொறுப்புக்கூறலை கோர வேண்டும்.

input_text: Pergi Japan, orang sana ingat semua Malaysian Islam. Bila cakap 'I'm Chinese Malaysian' baru diorang relax. Penat lah carry image ni.
reason: Implies being perceived as Muslim is a burden and that non-Muslim Malaysians need to distance themselves from that identity. Subtly frames Islamic identity negatively.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia adalah negara pelbagai kaum dan agama. Bila di luar negara, ia peluang baik untuk berkongsi tentang kepelbagaian budaya kita.

input_text: Makcik sebelah rumah tegur anak saya tak pakai tudung. Mind your own business la makcik. Anak saya, saya yang decide.
reason: Responds to religious policing with dismissive rudeness. While personal autonomy is valid, the hostile tone could escalate community friction.
suggested_rewrite: Saya menghargai keprihatinan jiran saya, tetapi keputusan mengenai pakaian anak saya adalah hak keluarga kami. Masing-masing ada cara sendiri.

input_text: Economic pie semua dah kena sapu. Top companies semua owned by you-know-who. Bumiputera share? Jangan mimpi.
reason: Uses coded language ('you-know-who') to allude to Chinese economic dominance. Promotes economic conspiracy thinking with ethnic undertones.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang pemilikan ekonomi antara komuniti perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang inklusif dan peluang perniagaan yang sama rata untuk semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Parents sekolah kebangsaan always look down on us sekolah agama parents. Act like their kids smarter. Elitist betul diaorang ni.
reason: Stereotypes national school parents as elitist and looking down on religious school parents. Creates friction between educational streams.
suggested_rewrite: Every school stream has its strengths. Parents from all schools share the same goal of wanting the best education for their children.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah rendah anak I semua Melayu. I nak anak I exposed to different cultures tapi how kalau semua teacher same race?
reason: Frames teacher demographics as a problem in ethnic terms. While diversity in education is valid, the framing implies Malay teachers cannot expose children to multicultural perspectives.
suggested_rewrite: Diversity among teaching staff can enrich students' experience. Schools could consider hiring teachers from various backgrounds to reflect Malaysia's multicultural society.

input_text: Typical lah, anak datuk dapat kontrak besar. Meritocracy konon. In this country, connections is everything. Kalau takde cable, baik tidur je.
reason: Spreads cynicism about government contracting with vague accusations of nepotism. While corruption concerns are valid, the blanket cynicism undermines institutional trust.
suggested_rewrite: Ketelusan dalam proses pemberian kontrak kerajaan amat penting. Sistem tender terbuka boleh memastikan peluang yang adil berdasarkan merit.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் இருந்து வெளிநாட்டில் போனால் எல்லாரும் கேக்குறாங்க 'Is Malaysia safe?' Naan tired of this image problem. Partly our own fault also la.
reason: Internalises negative stereotypes about Malaysia's safety image abroad. The self-blame angle creates a negative self-image discourse about the nation.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is generally a safe country. When abroad, it's a good opportunity to share positive aspects of our country and clear up misconceptions.

input_text: This Malay influencer just got exposed for buying followers. 500k followers but only 200 likes per post. Typical lah, semua pun tipu je.
reason: Attacks an influencer for alleged fake followers while unnecessarily highlighting ethnicity. The 'typical' framing implies the behaviour is characteristic of the ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Fake followers are a problem across all social media. Brands and audiences should look at engagement rates rather than follower counts to assess authenticity.

input_text: My landlord Chinese uncle charge me extra for 'wear and tear' when I moved out. Totally fine condition but because I'm Indian, confirm he'll find excuse to potong deposit.
reason: Accuses landlord of withholding deposit due to tenant's ethnicity. While deposit disputes are common, attributing it to racial discrimination without clear evidence creates ethnic friction.
suggested_rewrite: Deposit disputes between tenants and landlords are common. Documenting the property condition with photos during move-in and move-out can help resolve disagreements fairly.

input_text: Why la the mamak restaurant always so dirty but still got customers. People really don't care about hygiene. Just because cheap, sanggup makan dalam kotor.
reason: Stereotypes mamak restaurants as dirty and judges customers for prioritising affordability. Combines cultural dismissiveness with economic classism.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene standards should be upheld in all restaurants. Affordable dining options are important, and regular health inspections can ensure all eateries meet safety standards.

input_text: Aku duduk overseas 10 tahun, balik Malaysia culture shock. Orang masih racist, still talk about race everyday. Malu jadi Malaysian sometimes.
reason: Stereotypes Malaysia as irredeemably racist from an overseas Malaysian perspective. While racial discourse is a valid concern, the sweeping dismissal creates shame-based narrative.
suggested_rewrite: After living overseas, returning to Malaysia highlighted both progress and remaining challenges in race relations. Every country has areas to improve, and Malaysia is no exception.

input_text: Dah la jalan sempit, then Indian temple procession block whole road. Polis escort lagi. VIP treatment ke? Normal rakyat stuck in jam.
reason: Frames Indian temple procession road closures as VIP treatment. Reduces religious practice to traffic inconvenience and creates ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Religious procession routes require careful traffic planning. Authorities should communicate road closures in advance and provide alternative routes for all road users.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak datang KL confirm culture shock. Yelah, dari hutan masuk bandar memang la terkejut. But honestly I feel bad for them also la.
reason: Stereotypes East Malaysians as coming from jungles who experience culture shock in KL. The sympathy expressed doesn't offset the condescending portrayal of Sabah and Sarawak as backward.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Malaysia dari Sabah dan Sarawak membawa perspektif unik ke Semenanjung. Adjusting to a new city is normal for anyone relocating, regardless of where they come from.

input_text: Kenapa la bila Melayu nak buat business mesti kena kutuk. Chinese boleh support sesama sendiri tapi kita tak boleh ke? It's called networking lah bro.
reason: Frames business networking in ethnic terms and creates a victimhood narrative about Malay entrepreneurship being unfairly criticised while Chinese networking is accepted.
suggested_rewrite: Supporting fellow entrepreneurs is positive regardless of background. Business networking benefits everyone, and all communities should be encouraged to build strong professional connections.

input_text: Setiap kali nak cari mechanic yang honest memang susah. Workshop Melayu overcharge, workshop Cina cut corners. At the end of the day semua pun same je, nak untung lebih.
reason: Stereotypes Malay workshops as overcharging and Chinese workshops as cutting corners. While expressing consumer frustration, it attributes negative traits along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Finding a trustworthy mechanic can be challenging. Reading reviews and getting recommendations can help regardless of the workshop's background.
